# StripeEventSensor

Polls Stripe's Events API and triggers a RunRequest for each new event of the specified types. Cursor stored as last-seen event ID (Stripe events are ordered).

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key_env_var` | `str` | `"STRIPE_API_KEY"` | Env var with the Stripe secret key. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `event_types` | `List[str]` | `['charge.succeeded', 'invoice.payment_succeeded', 'customer.subscription.created']` | Stripe event types to listen for. |
| `limit_per_tick` | `int` | `100` | Max events per evaluation. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.StripeEventSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: stripe_subscription_sensor
  asset_keys: [subscription_metrics]
  api_key_env_var: STRIPE_API_KEY
  event_types: [customer.subscription.created, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted]
  minimum_interval_seconds: 300
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
